summary: Iteration 49 - Pricing Hub inline naming and Programs Hub split sections testing complete. All features verified working as expected.

issues: Two programs still named 'New Program' in database - should be renamed to meaningful names

action_items: Rename the two 'New Program' entries to meaningful program names via Pricing Hub
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 verified all new features: (1) Pricing Hub inline naming - Add Program shows input field not pre-named 'New Program', program/session names editable inline. (2) Duration dropdown has 47 options: 1-30 days, 1-4 weeks, 1-12 months, Annual. (3) Programs Hub split into 'Upcoming Programs' (blue border, 1 program) and 'Programs' (gold border, 7 programs). (4) All toggle columns present: Enroll, Closure, Start, End, Deadline, Timing, TZ, Excl.Offer, Badge, Online, Offline, In-Pers., Duration, Price, Tiers. (5) Closure dropdown appears when Enroll OFF with 4 options. (6) Excl.Offer text input appears when toggle ON. (7) Save All persists changes with success toast.

1-4 weeks: verified (1 Week, 2 Weeks, 3 Weeks, 4 Weeks)

Annual: verified

All 15 expected columns present: Enroll, Closure, Start, End, Deadline, Timing, TZ, Excl.Offer, Badge, Online, Offline, In-Pers., Duration, Price, Tiers
